effects.effect: Target 1 Vivosaur your Opponent controls; until the end of the next turn, it cannot swap Vivosaur Zones.

effects.name: Unchained Rage
effects.effect: This Vivosaur's Attack Skills deal +20 Base Damage for each FIRE Vivosaur in your Discard Pile. If the Defending Vivosaur is Excited, deal +30, instead.

effects.name: Sizziling Breath
effects.effect: Apply Excite to the Defending Vivosaur.
